## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] `node --check bin/install.mjs`
- [ ] `npm run pack:dry-run`
- [ ] `git diff --check`

## Safety

- [ ] No raw secrets, private keys, tokens, wallet keys, or credential files were added.
- [ ] Public docs do not claim private Full ECF internals are included.
- [ ] Any multi-agent/subagent claim is backed by real runtime-visible subagent evidence.
